'''Millennium Holos''' was established by its mother company, [[Millennium Entertainments]] as a production company. It was responsible for the [[holo-series]], "[[Who Are You To Accuse Me?]]"<ref name="HSCS" /> and also supervised the [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racing]] [[Team Millennium Holos]].<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|54|sports/1352_1.html|Ominaz Keeps Top Ranking}}</ref>
